strengths: 19+ years of engineering experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure)
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates sustained entrepreneurial technical leadership and open-source impact
Teaching and workshop history shows ability to share knowledge and mentor others
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or portfolio of AI products—current AI work (MCP, agents) is recent infrastructure work, not strategic AI platforms
All roles are individual contributor or self-directed founder; no evidence of director-level strategic leadership, organizational influence, or team guidance at scale
Background is full-stack web/mobile development; no cloud platform strategy, architecture, or advisory experience required for the role

key_factors.factor: AI/ML expertise and demonstrated AI products
Cloud platform strategy and architecture background

response.justification: Szabo brings strong engineering depth and entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective, satisfying the tenure and startup-experience criteria. However, the role explicitly requires director-level strategic leadership in AI and cloud platforms—responsibilities he has not demonstrated. His 19-year career shows skilled individual contributions across domains rather than recognized expertise in AI (no products or platforms), cloud platform strategy, or the organizational influence needed to identify differentiation opportunities and guide strategic adoption at customer and partner scale. His recent AI infrastructure work is too recent and narrowly focused to substitute for the preferred master's/PhD and demonstrated AI product expertise the role seeks.
